title: Memorandum Submitted by Professor Calestous Juma, Kennedy School of Government, Harvard University, to the Select Committee on International Development, House of Commons
summary: Written evidence submitted by Calestous Juma to the Select Committee on International Development, House of Commons in February 2006.
body: This memorandum was published in Private Sector Development, Fourth Report of Session 2005–06, Volume II on July 23, 2006.
